seo.metaTitle: White-Label DIFM Website Design for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Launch done-for-me website design under your brand. Hostopia's managed design service delivers professional SMB websites — from consultation to launch — without building an agency.

hero.headline: Professional Websites for SMBs — Built by Our Team, Branded as Yours
hero.subheadline: Thousands of SMBs have no website or an outdated one that hurts credibility. Most don't have the time, skills, or interest in building it themselves.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label DIFM Website Design gives you a fully managed design service to resell under your brand. Our team handles everything — consultation, design, copywriting, QA, and ongoing maintenance — while you own the customer relationship and revenue.
hero.badge: Managed website design, white-labeled for partners

items.title: A complete done-for-me experience
items.body: 1:1 consultation, professional design, copywriting, and deployment — no technical skills required.

items.title: Mobile-responsive, SEO-ready sites
items.body: Every site ships responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile — optimized for search from day one.

items.title: Built-in business tools
items.body: Contact forms, maps, galleries, appointment schedulers, coupons, and optional Online Store setup included.

items.title: Ongoing maintenance
items.body: Monthly maintenance time keeps the site current — content updates, seasonal changes, and design refreshes handled by the team.

features.heading: A Managed Design Service — Without Managing Designers
features.intro: You sell the service. Hostopia's team of designers, copywriters, and QA specialists handles everything from first consultation through ongoing maintenance.

cards.title: Professional Design & Copywriting
cards.body: Industry-aligned themes, high-quality imagery, on-brand colors and fonts — plus professional copywriting that communicates the SMB's value proposition clearly.

cards.title: Mobile-Responsive & Search-Optimized
cards.body: Every site automatically optimizes across desktop, tablet, and smartphone. Built with SEO foundations — meta tags, clean URLs, fast load times — from day one.

cards.title: Flexible Packages & Add-Ons
cards.body: Extra pages, lead forms, interactive galleries, appointment schedulers, coupons, and Online Store setup. Packages scale from basic presence to full digital storefront.

cards.title: Private-Label Project Center
cards.body: SMBs review drafts, approve changes, and collaborate with their Website Coordinator — all within a branded project portal under your name.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Compete with Agencies — Without Building One
partnerAdvantage.intro: DIFM Website Design lets you serve the SMBs that won't use a DIY builder but don't want to find and manage a freelancer or agency on their own.

items.title: Acquire and upgrade customers
items.body: Offer 'we build it for you' websites to SMBs who lack the time or skills. Convert non-digital customers into active digital subscribers with a hands-off experience.

items.title: Bundle into high-value packages
items.body: DIFM pairs with domains, email, hosting, SSL, and marketing services — creating multi-product engagements with higher ARPU and stronger retention.

items.title: Scale without creative headcount
items.body: Hostopia's fulfillment team, proprietary delivery platform, and proven QA processes handle volume. You grow revenue without growing cost.

lifecycleFit.heading: The DIFM Layer in Your Website Portfolio
lifecycleFit.intro: DIFM Website Design serves SMBs who need more than a builder but less than a custom WordPress build. It's the managed middle tier that completes your 'Get Online' stack.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Website Builder for DIY customers, DIFM for hands-off, Custom for complex needs.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and advanced services drive revenue growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position DIFM as the managed alternative for SMBs who won't use a DIY builder. Bundle with hosting, SSL, and email for a complete 'get online' package. Use it as the bridge between self-serve and custom development.

cta.headline: Ready to Launch Managed Website Design Under Your Brand?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to add DIFM Website Design to your portfolio, enable your sales teams with training and scripts, and start delivering professional websites at scale.
